name: rsqlite-wasm
description: SQLite-compatible database for the browser, powered by Rust and WebAssembly

scripts.build:wasm: cd .. && wasm-pack build --target web --release --out-dir ../../js/dist/wasm --no-pack crates/rsqlite-wasm && rm -f js/dist/wasm/.gitignore
scripts.build:wasm-node: cd .. && wasm-pack build --target nodejs --release --out-dir ../../js/dist/wasm-node --no-pack crates/rsqlite-wasm && rm -f js/dist/wasm-node/.gitignore && node js/scripts/patch-wasm-node.mjs
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:wasm && npm run build:ts && npm run build:meta

author: The rsqlite-wasm contributors
